mapper.select: SELECT * FROM submission WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND student_id = #{studentId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM submission WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM submission WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM submission WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM submission WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND approval_status = 2 AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM submission WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND approval_status = 2 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY update_time DESC

SELECT s.id, s.file_names AS fileNames, s.file_paths AS filePaths, s.submit_time AS submitTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM evaluation_result WHERE submission_id = s.id) > 0 AS evaluationStatus FROM submission s WHERE s.task_id = #{taskId} AND s.deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.create_time DESC
